events.label: Bash
events.text:
cd /app/media && ls -la && python3 -c "
import wave, contextlib
with contextlib.closing(wave.open('audio_bearing_003.wav','r')) as f:
    print('channels', f.getnchannels())
    print('sampwidth', f.getsampwidth())
    print('framerate', f.getframerate())
    print('frames', f.getnframes())
    print('duration', f.getnframes()/f.getframerate())
"

events.label: Bash
events.text:
cd /app/media && ls -la; python3 --version; python3 -c "
import wave, contextlib
with contextlib.closing(wave.open('audio_bearing_003.wav','r')) as f:
    print('channels', f.getnchannels())
    print('sampwidth', f.getsampwidth())
    print('framerate', f.getframerate())
    print('frames', f.getnframes())
    print('duration', f.getnframes()/f.getframerate())
" 2>&1
